## Clear Space

Maintain a clear space of 1/2 the height of the Mark on all sides of the logo, except in limited cases where the logo remains clearly recognizable and legible.

<figure className="h-auto w-full flex items-center justify-center">
  <svg width="50%" viewBox="0 0 1236 830" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="border-4 border-dashed">
